anchor_phrase: அரைசியல் பிழைத்தோர்க்கு அறம்கூற்று ஆவதூஉம்
source_claim: The epic declares failed rule, public praise of the renowned pattini, ripened past action, the anklet as cause and the work's relation to the three crowned kings
production_use: Governs political, moral and three-polity world design
notes: Embedded verse numbering checked against repository Tamil source

zone_or_system: PUK-Z03 migrant and overseas merchant quarter
anchor_phrase: யவனர் இருக்கையும் / புலம்பெயர் மாக்கள் கலந்துஇருந்து உறையும்
source_claim: Pukār contains unroofed or open mansions, spacious seats, Yavana residences and ship-borne migrant communities living together near the water
production_use: Design a cosmopolitan port quarter with lodging, brokerage and mixed populations
notes: Do not assign one uniform ethnicity or costume to all foreign residents

zone_or_system: PUK-Z04 perfume flower and ritual-goods street
anchor_phrase: வண்ணமும் சுண்ணமும் தண்நறுஞ் சாந்தமும் பூவும் புகையும்
source_claim: Sellers circulate through a street dealing in colour, lime, cooling sandal, flowers, smoke and fragrance
production_use: Create a specialised sensory market with supply, measurement and storage
notes: Commodity identification requires philological and material review

anchor_phrase: பட்டினும் மயிரினும் பருத்தி நூலினும்
source_claim: Skilled textile workers produce fine work from silk, hair or wool and cotton thread
production_use: Locate weaving, spinning, finishing and textile storage in Maruvūrppākkam
notes: Exact fibre identifications remain subject to specialist review

anchor_phrase: தூசும் துகிரும் ஆரமும் அகிலும் மாசுஅறு முத்தும் மணியும் பொன்னும்
source_claim: A broad street holds textiles or fine cloth, coral, sandalwood, akil, flawless pearls, gems, gold and rare valuables in immeasurable abundance
production_use: Design secure high-value trade frontage and storage distinct from ordinary stalls
notes: Some commodity terms require commentary comparison

anchor_phrase: பால்வகை தெரிந்த பகுதிப் பண்டமொடு கூலம் குவித்த கூல வீதியும்
source_claim: A dedicated street contains classified goods and piled grain or bulk produce
production_use: Create weighing, sacks, baskets, carts and warehouse labour
notes: Production must distinguish retail display from bulk storage

zone_or_system: PUK-Z04 food fish salt and meat market
anchor_phrase: மீன்விலைப் பரதவர் வெள்உப்புப் பகருநர்
source_claim: Food sellers, fish-selling Paratavar, white-salt merchants, meat sellers and other vendors occupy a dense food quarter
production_use: Build wet and dry food zones with waste, smell, preservation and crowd movement
notes: Occupational terms must not be flattened into modern caste labels

anchor_phrase: கஞ்ச காரரும் செம்புசெய் குநரும் மரங்கொல் தச்சரும் கருங்கைக் கொல்லரும்
source_claim: Bronze or bell-metal workers, copper workers, carpenters, blacksmiths, visual craftsmen, clay workers, goldsmiths, jewellers, tailors and leather stitchers form a large craft economy
production_use: Design workshops by material process, heat, tools, apprentices and waste
notes: Several craft titles need exact lexical review before final signage or dialogue

anchor_phrase: குழலினும் யாழினும் குரல்முதல் ஏழும் வழுஇன்றி இசைத்து
source_claim: Master musicians correctly render the seven notes through flute, yāḻ and voice, alongside small-handicraft workers and service specialists
production_use: Create musician residences, teaching, rehearsal and instrument-maintenance spaces
notes: Connect with Arangēṟṟu Kāthai performance evidence

anchor_phrase: மறுஇன்றி விளங்கும் மருவூர்ப் பாக்கமும்
source_claim: The preceding commodity, craft, food and music districts together define the brilliant Maruvūrppākkam quarter
production_use: Use as the controlling spatial basis for the port-facing working city
notes: Quarter boundaries and street order remain a production reconstruction

anchor_phrase: கோவியன் வீதியும் கொடித்தேர் வீதியும் பீடிகைத் தெருவும்
source_claim: Paṭṭiṉappākkam includes the royal street, bannered-chariot street and market or platform street
production_use: Build a ceremonial axis capable of processions, official movement and elite commerce
notes: Meanings of கோவியன் and பீடிகை require commentary cross-check

zone_or_system: PUK-Z08 elite merchant and learned residential zone
anchor_phrase: பெருங்குடி வாணிகர் மாட மறுகும் மறையோர் இருக்கையும்
source_claim: The quarter contains multi-storeyed streets of great merchants, residences of learned ritual specialists, farmers, physicians, time-calculators, gem workers and bangle cutters
production_use: Differentiate elite homes, professional residences and specialist streets
notes: Do not turn all high-status buildings into palaces

zone_or_system: PUK-Z07 court entertainment and service professions
anchor_phrase: சூதர் மாகதர் வேதாளிகரொடு நாழிகைக் கணக்கர்
source_claim: Bards, panegyrists, heraldic performers, timekeepers, entertainers, courtesans, dancers, flower sellers, attendants, instrumentalists and comic performers occupy differentiated residences
production_use: Create a court-facing service and performance economy
notes: Professional categories require specialist review before character assignment

anchor_phrase: கடும்பரி கடவுநர் களிற்றின் பாகர் நெடுந்தேர் ஊருநர் கடுங்கண் மறவர்
source_claim: Horse handlers or riders, elephant mahouts, charioteers and warriors occupy a large surrounding quarter
production_use: Design stables, elephant care, vehicle yards, barracks and service routes
notes: Animal welfare and historically plausible vehicle use require separate dossiers

anchor_phrase: பாடல்சால் சிறப்பின் பட்டினப் பாக்கமும்
source_claim: Royal, elite-merchant, learned, entertainment, military and transport functions together define Paṭṭiṉappākkam
production_use: Use as the controlling basis for the administrative and elite city
notes: Do not visually duplicate Maruvūrppākkam

anchor_phrase: இருபால் பகுதியின் இடைநிலம் ஆகிய ... நாள்அங் காடியில்
source_claim: The day market lies in the middle ground between the two great quarters, under a dense tree grove, filled with sellers' and buyers' voices
production_use: Place a civic-commercial interface between Maruvūrppākkam and Paṭṭiṉappākkam
notes: This is a key spatial relation for the city map

anchor_phrase: காவல் பூதத்துக் கடைகெழு பீடிகை
source_claim: At a guardian-spirit altar people offer cooked pulses, sesame preparations, meat or rich food, flowers, incense and pongal while women perform ritual dance and bless the realm against hunger disease and war
production_use: Design civic protection ritual as food, movement, sound and political prayer
notes: Offering terms and ritual identity require philological review

anchor_phrase: மருவூர் மருங்கின் மறம்கொள் வீரரும் பட்டின மருங்கின் படைகெழு மாக்களும்
source_claim: Warriors from both city quarters perform offering, martial display and victory prayer for the king at the full-offering altar
production_use: Show cross-quarter military participation in festival governance
notes: Violent or self-wounding imagery must follow the Tamil text and ethical review

anchor_phrase: ஐவகை மன்றத்தும் அரும்பலி உறீஇ
source_claim: The city has five specialised public forums: the Vellidai forum, Ilañci forum, standing-stone forum, Bhūta square and Pāvai forum, each associated with custody healing justice exposure or moral correction
production_use: Map the five forums as distinct civic institutions rather than fantasy monuments
notes: Individual functions must be verified against commentaries before screenplay use

zone_or_system: PUK-Z11 festival inauguration and city decoration
anchor_phrase: மங்கல நெடுங்கொடி வான்உற எடுத்து
source_claim: The festival is inaugurated through drums, elephant procession, raised auspicious banner, decorated gateways, full pots, lamps, standards, fly-whisks and the assembly of councils, princes, merchants, cavalry, elephants and chariots
production_use: Design a staged civic mobilisation with labour and hierarchy
notes: Avoid later temple-festival defaults unless separately supported

anchor_phrase: பிறவா யாக்கைப் பெரியோன் கோயிலும் ... அறவோர் பள்ளியும்
source_claim: Festival observance spans institutions associated with Śiva, Murukaṉ, Balarāma, Viṣṇu, the king, Vedic fire ritual, multiple divine groups, ascetic schools, charity, prisoner release and organised music
production_use: Build a plural civic-sacred landscape rather than one dominant temple complex
notes: Architectural forms must not be inferred from later temples

zone_or_system: PUK-Z11 festival duration and continuous public life
anchor_phrase: முழவுக்கண் துயிலாது முடுக்கரும் வீதியும்
source_claim: Festival streets remain awake with drums, crowds, pleasure gardens, perfume, companions, musicians and urban courtesans
production_use: Create day-night continuity, congestion, fatigue, waste and entertainment systems
notes: Connect with Canto 4 urban time and Canto 6 beach transition

anchor_phrase: பதினோர் ஆடலும் பாட்டின் பகுதியும்
source_claim: The festival includes mythic songs and eleven codified dances performed with distinct costume, form and convention
production_use: Develop a researched repertoire rather than generic montage
notes: Requires dance music and iconography specialists

zone_or_system: PUK-Z09 Mādhavi costume and ornament system
anchor_phrase: பரியகம் நூபுரம் பாடகம் சதங்கை
source_claim: Mādhavi's preparation names bathing, fragrance, hair treatment, foot cosmetics, garments and a detailed sequence of anklets, leg ornaments, girdles, armlets, bracelets, rings, necklaces, ear and head ornaments
production_use: Create a continuity-controlled professional costume dossier
notes: Each ornament term requires jewellery-specialist and philological review

zone_or_system: PUK-Z11 dawn movement to the sea
anchor_phrase: வைகறை யாமம் ... நகர வீதி நடுவண் போகிக்
source_claim: At dawn Mādhavi and Kōvalaṉ move through decorated streets, merchant areas and the overseas quarter toward the shoreline amid the festival crowd
production_use: Map the travel route from residence through city to beach
notes: Vehicle identifications அத்திரி and வையம் require review

anchor_phrase: வண்ணமும் சாந்தும் மலரும் சுண்ணமும் ... காவலர் விளக்கமும்
source_claim: The beach and adjoining market are lit by separate lamps of perfume and flower sellers, craftsmen, food vendors, shopwomen, fish sellers, lighthouse keepers, fishing boats, overseas people and warehouse guards
production_use: Create a functional night-light map where each lamp identifies labour and risk
notes: This passage is the controlling source for beach illumination

zone_or_system: PUK-Z12 coastal commercial and leisure assembly
anchor_phrase: மலைப்பல் தாரமும் கடல்பல் தாரமும் வளம்தலை மயங்கிய
source_claim: Mountain and sea goods, ships, princes, merchant youths, attendants, dancers, singers and four social orders assemble in a vast noisy coastal festival space
production_use: Design overlapping commerce, status display, performance and crowd density
notes: Do not portray beach as an empty elite pleasure ground

anchor_phrase: புன்னை நீழல் புதுமணல் பரப்பில் ஓவிய எழினி சூழ
source_claim: Within a screw-pine enclosure under punnai shade, a temporary painted pavilion and canopied white-legged couch are prepared on fresh sand for Mādhavi and Kōvalaṉ
production_use: Design temporary elite privacy embedded inside the public beach world
notes: The pavilion must remain spatially connected to crowd and labour outside
